SessionStart.command: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "Write-Host '[governance] session started: apply repo instructions, keep changes minimal, and enforce layered architecture.'"

UserPromptSubmit.command: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "Write-Host '[governance] reminder: zero diagnostics, no customer data, no emoji in code/logging/comments.'"

Stop.command: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "Write-Host '[governance] session end: verify get_errors clean and summarize validation performed.'"
